heroHeadline: Solar Becomes #1 Source of Global Energy Growth — 692 GW of Renewables Added in 2025
heroSubtitle: 3,782 days since the Paris Agreement — solar overtook all energy technologies in supply growth for the first time in 2025, with 5,149 GW of global renewable capacity. The EU's 90% by 2040 climate law is now in force.
footerNote: Data sourced from IEA, IRENA, IPCC, UNEP, BloombergNEF, and major international outlets. All figures reflect verified, publicly available data through April 2026.
